channel.title: reranker.uk changelog
channel.description: Release notes for reranker.uk — demo features, guides, and site improvements.

item.title: 25 Jun 2026 — Content expansion & polish
item.description: Architecture column on models table; Qwen3, Contextual AI, ColBERT rows; late-interaction guide; 7 demo presets; JSON-LD inLanguage; changelog RSS.

item.title: 25 Jun 2026 — i18n & SEO completion
item.description: Model page i18n gaps; changelog & privacy Chinese; hreflang tags; og:locale:alternate.

item.title: 25 Jun 2026 — Low-priority polish
item.description: Guide i18n; gzip share links; preset mobile layout; dual-diff a11y.
